locations.name: Edinburgh Castle
locations.description: Scotland's most famous castle, home to the Stone of Destiny and Crown Jewels

locations.name: Stirling Castle
locations.description: Strategic Highland fortress, scene of many battles including Bannockburn nearby
locations.visitor_info: Historic Scotland site with guided tours

locations.name: Dunvegan Castle
locations.description: Seat of Clan MacLeod for over 800 years, oldest continuously inhabited castle
locations.visitor_info: Family-owned castle with gardens and boat trips

locations.name: Inveraray Castle
locations.description: Seat of the Duke of Argyll, magnificent 18th-century Gothic Revival castle

locations.name: Duart Castle
locations.description: Clan Maclean's ancestral seat on the Isle of Mull
locations.visitor_info: Restored clan castle with stunning views

locations.name: Glenfiddich Distillery
locations.description: World-famous single malt whisky distillery in Speyside

locations.name: Laphroaig Distillery
locations.description: Iconic Islay whisky with distinctive peated flavor

locations.name: Talisker Distillery
locations.description: Only distillery on the Isle of Skye, producing maritime single malt
locations.visitor_info: Dramatic island setting with mountain views

locations.name: The Macallan Distillery
locations.description: Premium Speyside whisky known for sherry cask maturation
locations.visitor_info: Modern visitor center with premium experiences

locations.name: Culloden Battlefield
locations.description: Site of the final Jacobite battle in 1746, ending Highland clan warfare
locations.significance: End of the Jacobite cause and Highland way of life
locations.visitor_info: Comprehensive visitor center and battlefield walks

locations.name: Bannockburn
locations.description: Robert the Bruce's greatest victory, securing Scottish independence
locations.visitor_info: Heritage center with interactive battle experience

locations.name: Flodden Field
locations.description: Tragic defeat where James IV and the flower of Scottish nobility died

locations.name: Braemar Gathering
locations.description: Royal Highland Games attended by the Royal Family

locations.name: Cowal Highland Gathering
locations.description: World's largest Highland Games in Dunoon

locations.name: Lonach Highland Games
locations.description: Traditional games in Royal Deeside

locations.name: St Andrews Old Course
locations.description: The Home of Golf - most famous golf course in the world
locations.visitor_info: Public course, ballot system for tee times

locations.name: Royal Dornoch
locations.description: Championship links course in the Scottish Highlands
locations.significance: Third oldest golf course in the world
locations.visitor_info: Highland links golf at its finest

locations.name: Turnberry
locations.description: Coastal championship course with lighthouse views

locations.name: Loch Ness
locations.description: Home of the famous Loch Ness Monster
locations.legend: Nessie - Scotland's most famous mythical creature
locations.visitor_info: Boat trips, Loch Ness Centre, and monster spotting

locations.name: Ben MacDhui
locations.description: Haunted by the Grey Man of the mountain
locations.legend: Am Fear Liath Mòr - The Big Grey Man
locations.visitor_info: Challenging mountain hike, second highest in Scotland

locations.name: Rosslyn Chapel
locations.description: Mysterious medieval chapel linked to the Knights Templar
locations.legend: Holy Grail, Apprentice Pillar, Templar connections
locations.visitor_info: Intricate stone carvings and guided tours
